title: Use of the SHA3 One-Way Hash Functions in the Cryptographic Message Syntax (CMS)
source: Limited Additional Mechanisms for PKIX and SMIME
abstract: This document describes the conventions for using the one-way hash functions in the SHA3 family with the Cryptographic Message Syntax (CMS).  The SHA3 family can be used as a message digest algorithm, as part of a signature algorithm, as part of a message authentication code, or as part of a Key Derivation Function (KDF).
